SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class IntegratedSolveResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.IntegratedSolveResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class IntegratedSolveResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of a single steady-state solve of an IntegratedProductionModel.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:
  • IntegratedProductionModel.solve()

  • Constructor Details

    • IntegratedSolveResult

      public IntegratedSolveResult(boolean converged, int iterations, double fieldRate, Map<String,Double> wellRates, Map<String,Double> nodePressures, double revenue, double energyKWhPerDay, double emissionsKgPerDay, String method)
      Creates an integrated solve result.
      Parameters:
      converged - whether the network solve converged
      iterations - solver iteration count
      fieldRate - total field export rate in Sm3/day
      wellRates - per-well rate in Sm3/day keyed by well name
      nodePressures - node pressures in bara keyed by node name
      revenue - revenue rate in currency per day
      energyKWhPerDay - processing/compression energy in kWh per day
      emissionsKgPerDay - CO2 emissions in kg per day
      method - solver method that produced the result

  • Method Details

    • isConverged

      public boolean isConverged()
      Returns whether the solve converged.
      Returns:
      true if converged

    • getIterations

      public int getIterations()
      Returns the solver iteration count.
      Returns:
      iteration count

    • getFieldRate

      public double getFieldRate()
      Returns the total field export rate.
      Returns:
      field rate in Sm3/day

    • getWellRates

      public Map<String,Double> getWellRates()
      Returns the per-well rates.
      Returns:
      map of well name to rate in Sm3/day

    • getNodePressures

      public Map<String,Double> getNodePressures()
      Returns the solved node pressures.
      Returns:
      map of node name to pressure in bara

    • getRevenue

      public double getRevenue()
      Returns the revenue rate.
      Returns:
      revenue in currency per day

    • getEnergyKWhPerDay

      public double getEnergyKWhPerDay()
      Returns the processing/compression energy rate.
      Returns:
      energy in kWh per day

    • getEmissionsKgPerDay

      public double getEmissionsKgPerDay()
      Returns the CO2 emission rate.
      Returns:
      emissions in kg per day

    • getMethod

      public String getMethod()
      Returns the solver method used.
      Returns:
      method name
